name: Shivam J. Thete
title: Strategic Development Leader
headline: I build operating systems that turn strategy into measurable business outcomes.
summary: I work at the intersection of leadership, systems design, and cross-functional execution. My portfolio is centered on building scalable operating models across sales, finance, HR, and project delivery through process design, software implementation, and decision-ready reporting.

metrics.label: Leadership work spanning commercial and internal operations

focusAreas: Translate leadership priorities into process architecture and delivery plans.
